callGraph.callee:
editor
							.chain()
							.focus()
							.deleteRange(range)
							.insertContentAt(range.from, [
								{
									type: "file-mention",
									attrs: { path: props.relativePath, broken: false },
								},
								{ type: "text", text: " " },
							])
							.run

	onSearch,

	pendingReveal,

}
